song.title: Holy, Holy, Holy
song.lyrics:
[V] 1Holy, Holy, Holy, Lord God Almighty! 2Holy, Holy, Holy! All the saints adore Thee; 3Holy, Holy, Holy! Though the darkness hide Thee
1Unto everlasting days our song shall rise to Thee; 2Heaven’s elders cast their crowns down by the glassy sea; 3Though the eye of sinful man Thy glory may not see.
1Holy, Holy, Holy, Merciful and Mighty! 2Cherubim and seraphim worship too before Thee, 3Only Thou art holy, there is none beside Thee
1God in Three Persons, blessed Trinity! 2Who wert, and art, and evermore shalt be. 3Perfect in power, in love, and purity.
